pairing.reasoning: Avoids generic Inter/Playfair. Fraunces brings an 'Old Money Tech' authoritative trust, while Manrope provides clean legibility for dense information.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-serif font-light tracking-tight text-[#1F2937] leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-serif font-light tracking-tight text-[#1F2937]

primary.usage: Brand anchor, key buttons, dark footer background, text highlights

secondary.usage: Warm amber gold for accents, active states, donation highlights, award borders, success metrics

background.usage: Warm off-white for main page background to give an organic, high-end paper feel

surface.usage: Pure white for cards, floating menus, modals

navbar.behavior: Sticky, transparent at top, solid on scroll
navbar.cta_button: bg-[#F59E0B] text-white hover:bg-[#D97706] rounded-[20px] px-6 py-2 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg

hero.composition: Relative h-[90vh] min-h-[600px] flex items-center justify-center text-center overflow-hidden
hero.overlay: bg-black/50 (Never go darker, ensure image is visible)
hero.content: Large bold Fraunces H1 headline, strong CTAs
hero.counters: Animated impact stats floating above the bottom edge of hero in a glassmorphic card container

card_system.program_card: bg-white rounded-[20px] shadow-[0_10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[0_20px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]. Internal padding p-8.
card_system.award_card: bg-[#FAFAF7] border border-[#F59E0B]/30 rounded-[20px] p-6. Gold accent styling.
card_system.impact_card: Minimalist bento grid style, large CountUp numbers in #0F4C81, subtle #F59E0B accent line.
card_system.success_story: Image on top (aspect-video), content below with Fraunces heading and 'Read More' subtle link.

masonry_gallery.ux: Masonry layout (columns-2 md:columns-3 lg:columns-4). Smooth zoom hover (scale-105 duration-300 ease-in-out) on images. Click to open full-screen lightbox.
masonry_gallery.filter: Pill-shaped category filters (All, Education, Healthcare, Women) above the gallery.

volunteer_form.ux: Multi-step wizard UI. Step indicators (1/3) at top.
volunteer_form.fields: 2-3 fields per step to avoid cognitive overload.
volunteer_form.trust_badges: Include 'Secure submission' and 'Privacy Protected' under the submit button with Radix/Lucide lock icon.

donation_card.impact_preview: Dynamic text below chips (e.g., 'Your $50 provides 2 months of education').
donation_card.cta: Large, bold bg-[#0F4C81] text-white rounded-[20px] py-4 w-full text-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

footer.composition: Premium dark footer using bg-[#0F4C81] or extremely dark slate bg-[#111827] with #0F4C81 accents. Text in text-white/80.
footer.newsletter: Input with rounded-full or rounded-[20px] bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white placeholder:text-white/50.
footer.columns: Logo/Mission, Quick Links, Programs, Contact Info, Social Icons.

animation_choreography.entry_reveal: Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}. Use viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}.
animation_choreography.floating_awards: Framer Motion: animate={{ y: [-5, 5, -5] }} transition={{ repeat: 'Infinity', duration: 4, ease: 'easeInOut' }}.
animation_choreography.counters: react-countup triggered by intersection observer when scrolled into view.
animation_choreography.staggered_lists: Framer Motion variants with staggerChildren: 0.1 for cards in a grid.

accessibility_and_responsive.mobile_behavior: Images max-h-[60vh] on mobile. Stack grids to columns-1. Decrease padding to px-6 and py-16.
accessibility_and_responsive.reduced_motion: Wrap Framer Motion animations with useReducedMotion hook. If true, set initial/animate to opacity only (no y-axis translation).
accessibility_and_responsive.contrast: Ensure white text on #F59E0B meets WCAG 4.5:1 ratio, use text-white with drop-shadow or text-[#1F2937] on gold if needed.
accessibility_and_responsive.testing: Add data-testid='kebab-case-name' to all buttons, links, form inputs, and major sections.
